```cpp
template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
```

```cpp
}
```

```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    // Create a vector to hold the result
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;

    // Create a buffer_adaptor for the vector
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);

    // Create a binary_stream with the adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream<hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>>> stream(adaptor);

    // Write the header
    stream << packet.header;

    // Write the data string (with prefix)
    stream << packet.data;

    // Write 16 bytes of padding (0x00)
    stream.fill<16>(0x00);

    // Write the footer
```
